default.title: ConejoCreative — Your leap to success
default.description: Digital transformation company specialising in web development, custom software, automation, integrations and digital solutions for businesses.

home.title: Digital transformation and web development
home.description: We design and build professional websites, custom software and automations that drive your company's growth.

services.title: Services
services.description: Web development, custom software, process automation, integrations, business systems and artificial intelligence solutions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Success stories and digital transformation projects delivered by ConejoCreative.

about.title: About us
about.description: Meet the ConejoCreative team and how we work: closeness, quality and transparency in every digital project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we will reply within 48 business hours. Take your leap to success with ConejoCreative.

footer.description: Digital transformation company specialising in web development, custom software, automation and integrations for businesses.

hero.title: Your leap to success.
hero.description: At ConejoCreative we design and build professional websites, custom software and automations that grow your business. Technology made for companies that want to move forward.

services.title: What we can do for your company
services.description: We combine strategy, design and technology to build digital solutions that truly work.

web.title: Web development
web.description: Professional, fast, SEO-ready websites that turn visitors into customers.

software.title: Custom software
software.description: Applications designed around your real processes, without the limits of generic tools.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: We remove repetitive work by connecting your tools and automating your workflows.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence
ai.description: AI solutions applied to concrete use cases that bring measurable value to your business.

services.title: Services
services.description: We support your company across the whole digital cycle: from your first website to complete business systems.

web.title: Web development
web.description: Modern, fast and accessible websites, built with current technology and optimised for search engines.

sites.title: Professional websites
sites.description: A corporate digital presence that builds trust and represents your brand with quality.

software.title: Custom software
software.description: Applications designed from scratch for your processes, with a scalable and maintainable architecture.

automation.title: Process automation
automation.description: Automated workflows that reduce errors and free up your team's time.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: We connect your tools — CRM, ERP, invoicing, marketing — so they work as a single system.

systems.title: Business systems
systems.description: Internal management platforms adapted to how your company actually operates.

ai.title: Artificial intelligence solutions
ai.description: Assistants, analytics and intelligent automations applied to concrete business problems.

transformation.title: Digital transformation
transformation.description: Strategy and guidance to digitalise your company step by step, with measurable results.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Every project is a leap: here we will gather the cases where we helped companies grow with technology.

comingSoon.title: Success stories in preparation
comingSoon.description: We are documenting our first success stories. Very soon you will find real projects here, with context, solution and results.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We listen, analyse your processes and define the project goals together.

build.title: Design and development
build.description: We build the solution with frequent deliveries so you see progress from day one.

launch.title: Launch and improvement
launch.description: We ship, measure and keep improving the product with real data.

about.title: About us
about.description: We are ConejoCreative, a digital transformation company that helps other companies take their leap to success.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: To bring quality technology closer to companies that want to grow. We believe a good digital product is not a luxury: it is the foundation for competing today. That is why we work closely with our clients, speak plainly and build solutions they understand and control.

closeness.title: Closeness
closeness.description: We speak your language, not just the technical one. Every project has direct contacts and constant communication.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We care about the details in code, design and performance. What we deliver is built to last.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear budgets, realistic timelines and explained decisions. No surprises, no small print.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Tell us what you need and we will propose the best way to get there.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I have read and accept the privacy policy and the processing of my data to answer my request.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: Thank you for writing to us. We will reply within 48 business hours.

errors.message: Tell us a bit more (at least 10 characters).
